Automate transfers starting next month: set up recurring transfer of $400 to Down Payment subaccount and $200 to credit card on payday; ensure funds available by transferring day after payday.

Budget update: reflect new allocations by moving $400 to Down Payment and $200 to Extra CC payments in zero-based budget; implement two trims now (for example: cut dining_out by $100 and subscriptions by $60, and reduce groceries/other by $140) or earmark identified extra income. Cancel/trim unused subscriptions and reallocate that monthly amount to the new transfers.

Guardrails: add low-balance alert on checking account (e.g., $500) and a calendar reminder each week to verify the transfers cleared and check envelope balances. Keep a small cushion (one–two paychecks) in checking so automated transfers won’t overdraft; if the cushion is breached, pause nonessential transfers and catch up next payday.
